summary: Website project for CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust. Fixing UI issues including black screen below footer in desktop view.
known_issues: Black screen/empty space appears below footer in desktop view

existing_features.title: Remove the black empty space/screen that appears below the footer ('© 2026 CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust. All rights reserved. Built with ❤️ by Athira S') in desktop view. Ensure the page ends cleanly at the footer with no extra background, overflow, or height causing a black region beneath it.
